info.name: ScmCube UAT Integration API
info.description: Collection for ScmCube UAT Integration API endpoints as per V_1.2.0.0.0 documentation.

exec: console.log("Access Token updated in collection variables");
console.error("Login failed or accessToken not found in response");

request.description: Authenticates user and retrieves a JWT access token for subsequent API calls.
